title.en: And just like that, time passed slowly.

content.en:
Rumble!!!

One of the three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures instantly flew this supreme true ancestor away, showing an invincible posture.

With these three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures, the strongest true ancestors could not break through the blockade, so they could only kill the other forbidden bloodline creatures first, and when the forbidden bloodline creatures were almost killed, they would all work together to deal with these three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Some True Ancestors were timid, or were severely injured and could no longer participate in the battle, so they withdrew from the battlefield, and some of them hid from a distance to watch the battle, and this type of True Ancestor was directly killed by the Supreme True Ancestors.

If you don't want to fight, then leave, like this True Ancestor watching the battle, other True Ancestors will not let it go, otherwise if everyone watches the battle, who will fight?

In the end, only a very small number of True Ancestors left here and went to other places to search for forbidden and strange things, and most of the True Ancestors were still fighting here, after all, the Natal Talent Fruit was their hope for rebirth.

Once they obtained a Natal Talent Fruit, they could surpass many top geniuses and become the human masters of the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

The dream was before, how could they give up so easily.

A True Ancestor tried to break through the blockade, but one by one failed and fell, but there was still an endless stream of successors, all of whom wanted to be the lucky one.

In this atmosphere, many True Ancestors had no idea what death was at all and were completely dominated by desire.

In a short period of time, the 100,000 True Ancestors fell, and only three True Ancestors remained.

And there are less than thirty forbidden bloodline creatures left, including the three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures.

"There are only thirty bloodline creatures left, kill, victory is just around the corner!"

One of the Supreme True Ancestors shouted.

Everyone was shocked, and one by one they burst out with the strongest combat power, frantically attacking these bloodline creatures.

As there were fewer and fewer forbidden bloodline creatures, everyone's mood was getting better and better.

However, at this moment, many True Ancestors seemed to have a soul in their hearts, and they all abandoned those forbidden bloodline creatures to snatch the natal talent fruit.

After all, there are so few forbidden bloodline creatures nowadays, it is difficult to stop them.

And there are about 30,000 True Ancestors left, but there are only 1,024 Natal Talent Fruits, and it is definitely impossible for one person to have one, so it is right to strike first.

"Damn, you guys are so shameless!"

The True Ancestors, who were resisting the forbidden bloodline creatures, said angrily.

Soon.

The first Natal Talent Fruit was captured by a Supreme True Ancestor, and the Natal Talent Fruit snatching battle began.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue are not stupid, and they are also the second true ancestors who belong to the first batch of snatching the natal talent fruit.

Both of them are very strong, so they each quickly snatched a natal talent fruit.

Of course, their goal is not just one Natal Talent Fruit, but more Natal Talent Fruits.

Many True Ancestors were not united, so the three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures began to slaughter wildly, killing a True Ancestor, but those top True Ancestors and Supreme True Ancestors didn't care, among them, after the top True Ancestors seized one or two Natal Talent Fruits, they fled wildly, not ready to seize more Natal Talent Fruits, for fear of falling here.

In short, it's a mess here.

Unconsciously, all 1,024 Natal Talent Fruits were gone, and they were all snatched away by the True Ancestors.

But the three strongest forbidden bloodline creatures have also killed a lot of True Ancestors, and now there are less than 20,000 True Ancestors left, and these less than 20,000 True Ancestors have begun to fight each other again, just to snatch the natal talent fruit.

Among them, some elite True Ancestors who have obtained the Natal Talent Fruit and the weaker top True Ancestors have become the targets of many True Ancestors, and they besiege these True Ancestors and kill them, and the True Ancestors who have snatched the Natal Talent Fruit have become the targets of others.

In this way, a True Ancestor fell one after another, and the loss was faster than the loss of the forbidden bloodline creatures besieging it.

Many True Ancestors who had obtained the Natal Talent Fruit tried to leave the Forbidden Forest as fast as they could, not wanting to collect any more forbidden treasures at all.

For them, no matter how many forbidden treasures there are, they can't compare to the natal talent fruit!

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue are relatively safe, no one dares to snatch their natal talent fruit, after all, these are two supreme true ancestors with strong combat power, they can be called the two strongest true ancestors here, who dares to besiege them?

"Sister, how many natal talent fruits have you obtained?"

Ye Xingchen asked.

"Five, what about you, brother?" Ye Xingyue said.

"I, six!" Ye Xingchen laughed and said: "I will use one, and when the time comes, I will give one to each of my parents, and I can leave three more, and these three will be left to my heirs in the future!"

The two of them can actually get more natal talent fruits, such as snatching other people's natal talent fruits, which can naturally be easily done with their strength.

But they also don't want to kill too many people, and the more Natal Talent Fruit they get, the higher the likelihood of becoming a target.

They're not stupid enough to really think they're safe out of the Forbidden Forest.

Maybe when they go out, there will be a battle in the outside world, and I don't know how many True Ancestors will take action to snatch the Natal Talent Fruit, and many of them are invincible True Ancestors.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue did not continue to snatch the natal talent fruit, but went to find the forbidden treasure.

I have to say that there are really a lot of forbidden strange things in this forbidden forest, and since there are not many people looking for forbidden strange things, this makes them quickly find a lot of forbidden strange things.

And at this time, there was a true ancestor who left the forbidden forest with the natal talent fruit.

---------------

"Hahaha, it's the true ancestor of my Heavenly Sword Sect!"

The Heavenly Sword Gate's Wind Sword Venerable laughed.

The top True Ancestor who came out of the Forbidden Forest quickly flew towards the Heavenly Sword Sect True Ancestors.

However, an invincible True Ancestor made a brazen move.

It's the Golden Light Sword Venerable of the Heavenly Sword Sect!

The Golden Light Sword Venerable actually also has a Dao-level natal talent, but who dislikes that he has a few Dao-level natal talents?

Although he can only eat one Natal Talent Fruit, the Dao-level Natal Talent he obtained before was not obtained by devouring the Natal Talent Fruit, but the Dao-level Natal Talent obtained by entering the Talent Ancestral Pool, so he can also use the Natal Talent Fruit to obtain the Dao-level Natal Talent.

Once he has one more Dao-level natal talent, in case it is a Dao-level natal talent that fits him, his strength may be able to increase a little more, and maybe he will be able to reach the ultimate level of the Invincible True Ancestor.

At that time, he could become the strongest being under the Supreme True Ancestor!

As long as the Supreme True Ancestor doesn't make a move, at the level of the Invincible True Ancestor, he is invincible!

However, after the moment when the Golden Light Sword Venerable made a move, there was an invincible true ancestor who made a move, and it was the unbroken true ancestor of King Kong City.

"You're looking for death!"

The Wind Sword Venerable said angrily.

It's a pity that the Wind Sword Venerable's reaction was a little slower, and the top True Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Gate was instantly killed by the Golden Light Sword Venerable and the Unbroken True Ancestor, but the body of the top True Ancestor fell into the hands of the Golden Light Sword Venerable.

"Kill the true ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect for me!"

The Wind True Ancestor commanded.

Suddenly, the Heavenly Sword Sect and the Heavenly Sword Sect went to war.

As a True Ancestor came out of the Forbidden Forest, he became the target of other True Ancestors, which in turn led to a great battle of forces.

Those True Ancestors who have obtained the Natal Talent Fruit think that if they have obtained the Natal Talent Fruit, they can rise completely, but they have no chance to live at all, and as soon as they go out, they will die.

If you don't go out, you will be besieged by other True Ancestors inside the Forbidden Forest.

In addition, the Forbidden Forest shielded their perception, and they were unable to know what was going on in the outside world, so they rushed out one by one and became the target of others.

Of course.

There are also lucky people who have been successfully protected by their own sect, but there are too few such lucky people.

Thundered!!!!!

The Vajra True Kingdom was beaten to pieces, and there were too many True Ancestors in this battle.

Although no Dao Ancestor came, so many True Ancestors were fighting, and the Vajra True Kingdom couldn't bear it.

But.

The difference between the Vajra True Kingdom and other True Kingdoms is that most of the geniuses of the Vajra True Kingdom live in giant cities, which are basically made of Dao weapons, contain billions of living beings, and are extremely strong.

Even if the Vajra True Kingdom is shattered, it will not be able to shake these giant cities.

Therefore, even if the Vajra True Kingdom is really broken, the loss of Vajra City is not too great, but there are just a lot of ordinary creatures missing.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue did not participate in the battle, but watched the battle.

They were waiting for Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue to come out, lest Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue would be attacked by others as soon as they came out.
